title: Executor Result — Per-AC Verdict
description: Formal output schema for all ACT agent roles. Every AC must be reported by ID with a machine-verifiable verdict and evidence.

acceptance_criteria.description: Every AC from the task brief must appear here — no omissions.

id.description: Matches AC ID from TASKS.md (AC1, AC2, ...)

evidence.description: File:line reference or test output excerpt proving satisfaction

skeleton_function.description: Test function name from preflight-result.json that proves this AC

reason.description: If satisfied=false: why not satisfied. If this is a RED result: why the test fails for the right reason.

message.description: Must follow Conventional Commits format (e.g. feat(task-001): added x)

verified_red.description: RED only: test_signal.py returned fail with property_id present

risks.description: For done_with_risks status: residual concerns that need supervisor attention

proof_of_work_path.description: REFACTOR only: path to proof-of-work.md in the run archive

missing_acs.description: ACs found missing during REFACTOR review — triggers new RED-GREEN cycle

turn.description: GREEN multi-turn: which turn produced this result
